zh.Longdon, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾隆格頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Ruggeley於1530年出生在英國斯塔福爾隆格頓時，她的父親Humphrey Ruggeley44歲，母親Margaret Hussey32歲。她於大約1551年與Richard Broughton在英國斯塔福爾隆格頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1600年在英國享年70歲。

zh-hans.Longdon, Staffordshire, England: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾隆格頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Ruggeley于1530年出生在英国斯塔福爾隆格頓时，她的父亲Humphrey Ruggeley44岁，母亲Margaret Hussey32岁。她于大约1551年与Richard Broughton在英国斯塔福爾隆格頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1600年在英国享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ruggeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Rugeley
meanings: English: locative name from Rugeley (Staffs). The place, recorded as Rugelie in 1086 ( Domesday Book ), is named with Old English hrycg ‘ridge’ + lēah ‘(woodland) clearing, glade’.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Ruggeley was born in 1530, in Longdon, Staffordshire, England, her father, Humphrey Ruggeley, was 44 and her mother, Margaret Hussey, was 32. She married Richard Broughton about 1551, in Longdon, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1600, in England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Ruggeley est née en 1530, à Longdon, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Humphrey Ruggeley, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margaret Hussey, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Broughton environ 1551, à Longdon, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1600, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Ruggeley 1530 in Longdon, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Humphrey Ruggeley 44 und ihre Mutter Margaret Hussey 32. Sie hat um 1551 in Longdon, Staffordshire, England Richard Broughton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1600 im Alter von 70 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Ruggeley è nata il nel 1530 nel Longdon, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Humphrey Ruggeley, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Margaret Hussey, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Richard Broughton circa 1551, nel Longdon, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1600, nel England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.Longdon, Staffordshire, England: イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアロングドン
ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Ruggeleyが1530年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアロングドンで生まれた時，父Humphrey Ruggeleyは44歳，母Margaret Husseyは32歳であった。約1551年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアロングドンでRichard Broughtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1600年にイギリスで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Ruggeley(이)가 1530년 영국 스태퍼드실르 론그던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Humphrey Ruggeley(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Hussey(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1551년 영국 스태퍼드실르 론그던에서 Richard Broughton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1600년 영국에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Longdon, Staffordshire, England: Longdon, Stæffordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Ruggeley nasceu em 1530, em Longdon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Humphrey Ruggeley, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Hussey, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Broughton aproximadamente 1551, em Longdon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1600, em Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Ruggeley родилась в 1530 г. в местности лонгдон, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Humphrey Ruggeley было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Hussey, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Broughton около 1551 г. в местности лонгдон, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1600 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Ruggeley nació en 1530, en Longdon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Humphrey Ruggeley, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Margaret Hussey, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Richard Broughton aproximadamente 1551, en Longdon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1600, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
